title: Transition to Custodian of Legitimacy, Not Executive Rule
situation: With investiture complete, Highborn Atabey refrains from governance actions, maintaining strict boundaries and intervening only on ritual grounds.
knows: The ceremonial mandate is complete and valid
Their authority is to guard ritual order rather than govern directly
Acting outside ritual legitimacy would violate sacred office
does_not_know: Specific policy decisions the Cacique will enact
Whether future crises will require new rites of correction
